hub_scientist_intro.speaker: Dr. Elena Voss
hub_scientist_intro.text: You're awake... after three thousand years. We found you beneath the Nexus chamber.

hub_scientist_intro.speaker: Dr. Elena Voss
hub_scientist_intro.text: The temporal rifts are tearing history apart. Events are being rewritten — erased.

hub_scientist_intro.speaker: Dr. Elena Voss
hub_scientist_intro.text: We built the Chronoportal, but only a being like you can survive the jumps.

hub_scientist_intro.speaker: Kael
hub_scientist_intro.text: I remember... fragments. A duty to protect the flow of time.

hub_scientist_intro.speaker: Dr. Elena Voss
hub_scientist_intro.text: Take these Chrono Cards. They'll channel powers from the eras you visit. Use them wisely.

hub_scientist_intro.speaker: Dr. Elena Voss
hub_scientist_intro.text: Your first mission: Ancient Egypt. The construction of the Great Pyramid is under threat.

hub_scientist_post_egypt.speaker: Dr. Elena Voss
hub_scientist_post_egypt.text: You've stabilized the Egyptian timeline. But the rifts are spreading.

hub_scientist_post_egypt.speaker: Dr. Elena Voss
hub_scientist_post_egypt.text: Next target: Rome, 44 BC. The Ides of March. Something is preventing Caesar's assassination.

hub_scientist_post_egypt.speaker: Dr. Elena Voss
hub_scientist_post_egypt.text: I know it sounds brutal, but that event shaped the entire Western world. History must run its course.

hub_scientist_post_rome.speaker: Dr. Elena Voss
hub_scientist_post_rome.text: Both timelines are stabilized, but the readings are off the charts. The source is HERE.

hub_scientist_post_rome.speaker: Dr. Elena Voss
hub_scientist_post_rome.text: The Eraser — whatever it is — it's manifesting in the lab. This is the final stand, Kael.

hub_scientist_post_rome.speaker: Kael
hub_scientist_post_rome.text: Then I face it head on. The timeline will hold.

egypt_imhotep.speaker: Imhotep
egypt_imhotep.text: Stranger from beyond the sands... you carry the mark of the timeless ones.

egypt_imhotep.speaker: Imhotep
egypt_imhotep.text: Dark spirits have possessed Medjay captain Khufu's guard. They sabotage the pyramid's construction.

egypt_imhotep.speaker: Imhotep
egypt_imhotep.text: The workers flee in terror. Without the pyramid, the Pharaoh's passage to the afterlife is severed.

egypt_imhotep.speaker: Kael
egypt_imhotep.text: Show me where they strike. I will end this corruption.

egypt_imhotep.speaker: Imhotep
egypt_imhotep.text: Take this — the Pharaoh's Flame. Sacred fire to burn away the darkness.

egypt_worker.speaker: Pyramid Worker
egypt_worker.text: The stones... they move on their own at night. The spirits are angry!

egypt_worker.speaker: Pyramid Worker
egypt_worker.text: Imhotep says you can help. Please, the pyramid must be completed.

rome_brutus.speaker: Brutus
rome_brutus.text: You... you are not of this time. I can see it in your eyes.

rome_brutus.speaker: Kael
rome_brutus.text: I'm here to ensure history follows its path. The Ides of March must proceed.

rome_brutus.speaker: Brutus
rome_brutus.text: A temporal phantom guards Caesar. It shields him with power beyond mortal understanding.

rome_brutus.speaker: Brutus
rome_brutus.text: If you can destroy it, the natural course of events will resume.

rome_brutus.speaker: Kael
rome_brutus.text: History is cruel, but it must be preserved. I'll handle the anomaly.

rome_senator.speaker: Roman Senator
rome_senator.text: Strange lights in the Forum last night. The augurs say the gods are at war.

rome_senator.speaker: Roman Senator
rome_senator.text: Caesar grows bolder each day, protected by some unseen force. It's unnatural.

modern_final.speaker: The Eraser
modern_final.text: You cannot stop entropy, Guardian. All timelines converge to nothing.

modern_final.speaker: Kael
modern_final.text: Every era I've walked through — they all matter. Every life, every choice.

modern_final.speaker: The Eraser
modern_final.text: Then let me show you what nothing feels like.
